heading: Restriction on use of Arkansas pipeline right of way
label: 968 Restriction on use of Arkansas pipeline right of way
text: Nothing in sections 966 to 970 of this title shall authorize the use of such right of way except for the pipe line, and then only so far as may be necessary for its construction, maintenance, and care.
